languages.text: "Скажи, Вольный Торговец. Как давно ты знал{mf||а}, что Теодора — предательница и еретичка? И почему скрыл{mf||а} это от всех?"

traits.locale_text: "Скажи, Вольный Торговец. Как давно ты знал{mf||а}, что Теодора — предательница и еретичка? И почему скрыл{mf||а} это от всех?"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "Tell me, Rogue Trader. How long ago did you learn that Theodora was a traitor and a heretic? And why did you hide it from everyone?"
languages.original_text: "Скажи, Вольный Торговец. Как давно ты знал{mf||а}, что Теодора — предательница и еретичка? И почему скрыл{mf||а} это от всех?"

traits.locale_text: "Tell me, Rogue Trader. How long ago did you learn Theodora was a traitor and a heretic? And why did you hide it from everyone?"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Tell me, Rogue Trader. How long ago did you learn that Theodora was a traitor and a heretic? And why did you hide it from everyone?"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "Sag mir, Schurkenhändler. Wie lange ist es her, dass du erfahren hast, dass Theodora eine Verräterin und Ketzerin ist? Und warum hast du es vor allen verheimlicht?"
languages.original_text: "Tell me, Rogue Trader. How long ago did you learn that Theodora was a traitor and a heretic? And why did you hide it from everyone?"

traits.locale_text: "Sag mir, Schurkenhändler. Wie lange ist es her, dass du erfahren hast, dass Theodora eine Verräterin und Ketzerin ist? Und warum hast du es vor allen verheimlicht?"

languages.text: "Dites-moi, marchand clandestin. Depuis combien de temps avez-vous appris que Théodora était une traîtresse et une hérétique ? Et pourquoi l'avez-vous caché à tout le monde ?"
languages.original_text: "Tell me, Rogue Trader. How long ago did you learn that Theodora was a traitor and a heretic? And why did you hide it from everyone?"

traits.locale_text: "Dites-moi, marchand clandestin. Depuis combien de temps avez-vous appris que Théodora était une traîtresse et une hérétique ? Et pourquoi l'avez-vous caché à tout le monde ?"

languages.text: "Dime, Rogue Trader. ¿Cuánto hace que supiste que Theodora era una traidora y una hereje? ¿Y por qué se lo ocultaste a todo el mundo?"
languages.original_text: "Tell me, Rogue Trader. How long ago did you learn that Theodora was a traitor and a heretic? And why did you hide it from everyone?"

traits.locale_text: "Dime, Rogue Trader. ¿Cuánto hace que supiste que Theodora era una traidora y una hereje? ¿Y por qué se lo ocultaste a todo el mundo?"

languages.text: "Söyle bana, Haydut Tüccar. Theodora'nın bir hain ve kafir olduğunu ne kadar zaman önce öğrendin? Ve bunu neden herkesten sakladın?"
languages.original_text: "Tell me, Rogue Trader. How long ago did you learn that Theodora was a traitor and a heretic? And why did you hide it from everyone?"

traits.locale_text: "Söyle bana, Haydut Tüccar. Theodora'nın bir hain ve kafir olduğunu ne kadar zaman önce öğrendin? Ve bunu neden herkesten sakladın?"
